name: Matador Mining Limited
description: AuMEGA Metals Ltd, formerly known as Matador Mining Limited, is a mineral exploration company headquartered in Australia. The company is primarily focused on making major mineral discoveries in the vastly underexplored region of Newfoundland, Canada. Its core assets include the Cape Ray Gold Project and the Hermitage Flexure, which are situated along highly prospective geological structures. With a strategic partnership involving B2Gold, the company continues to advance its exploration efforts in this top-tier mining jurisdiction, aiming to unlock significant value through its extensive land package and commitment to systematic, high-quality exploration programs.
